name: Stage Timer
description: Remote-controlled countdown timer for live events. Controller on one device, fullscreen display on stage.

slotClasses.sidebar: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900 p-4

meta.dataShape: { id: string, label: string, duration: number, status: 'waiting' | 'running' | 'done', order: number }
meta.styling: Dark background, compact rows, drag handles for reorder, green highlight on active timer, strikethrough on done
meta.interactions: Click to select timer, drag to reorder, double-click to edit duration

meta.dataShape: { remaining: number, isRunning: boolean, isComplete: boolean }
meta.styling: Large centered countdown, green start button, red stop button, transport-style controls
Text input at bottom, send button, flash/urgent toggle
meta.interactions: Type message, click send or press Enter, toggle urgent mode

controller.flow: Operator sees timer schedule on left. Selects a timer → controls appear in main area. Starts/stops timer. Can send messages to stage display.

slotClasses.fullscreen: w-full h-screen flex flex-col items-center justify-center

meta.styling: Black background, massive white countdown text (text-[20vw]), color changes to yellow <60s, red <30s, flashing when complete
meta.interactions: Display only — no interaction on stage view

meta.styling: Overlay at bottom of screen, white text on semi-transparent black, slides up on new message, urgent mode flashes screen border red

viewer.flow: Speaker sees countdown on screen. When operator sends message, it appears as overlay. When time is up, display turns red and flashes.
